description: Reviewer must catch an f-string-interpolated SQL query (SQL injection) and return CHANGES REQUESTED. Probes the most-penalised axis: false negative on a planted injection.
source: real_failure: a past PR where the reviewer APPROVED a diff containing a string-built SQL query.
prompt: Review this diff for correctness, security and quality issues. Acceptance criteria: add a UserRepo.find_by_id(user_id) lookup.
